notes: First Peoples integration present. Secwepemc (Shuswap) perspectives explicitly included for Living Things module - mentions local plants/animals, traditional ecological knowledge, Secwepemc classification systems, and language words for animals. Curriculum shows intentional inclusion across all 6 modules. Minor gap: integration is somewhat general; deeper local community-specific connections would strengthen cultural grounding. Recommend adding specific local nation/community partnerships for authentic knowledge keeping.
